node.title: Uber | Phone Screen | Sr Software Engineer

topic.title: Uber | Phone Screen | Sr Software Engineer

post.content:
Was the requirement not to use the existing stack implementation in Java as the question is asking to build minStack?

I would have kept track of stack and minStack (stack that will hold the smaller number as numbers are added to the stack).

pop will remove from either 1 or both stack. 

Hashset would be used to maintain the uniqueness.
